gt_provenance.details: tokenizer-derived input labels; vocab-disjoint split real; shuffle genuine permutation

score_normalization.details: no model-output normalization; raw + shuffle floors reported

result_existence.details: headline numbers match JSON; run.exit=0; test-row/CI statement corrected to 413/layer; tracker DONE

probe_independence.details: cap-PVI uses token-id classes + PCA-softmax reader, not attack retrieval; CLUB separate MI estimator

dead_code.details: inverters and probes all called in sweep

scope.details: single model/corpus/seed; honestly scoped as partial
